summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Website Settings feature. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working including 15 tabs, tab switching, save functionality, and access control.
critical_code_review_comments: WebsiteSettingsPage.jsx is 1332 lines - consider splitting tab content into separate components for better maintainability
Minor eslint warning: useEffect missing 'fetchAllSettings' dependency (line 68) - add to dependency array
Manager role correctly blocked at API level returning 403, but error key is 'detail' not 'error' (minor inconsistency)
seed_data_creation: Test sections created during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Website Settings is fully functional. Super admin can access via /portal/admin/website-settings. All 15 tabs (header, hero, stats, about, process, courses, features, mentors, reviews, academy, partners, faqs, contact, footer, seo) are working. Public endpoint at /api/website-settings/:section works without auth. Manager role correctly blocked from accessing this feature.

frontend_features.15 tabs visible: WORKING - Header/Nav, Hero, Stats, About, How It Works, Courses, Why Us, Mentors, Reviews, Academy, Partners, FAQs, Contact, Footer, SEO/Meta
frontend_features.Tab switching: WORKING - each tab shows appropriate form fields
frontend_features.Save button triggers API: WORKING - shows success toast 'Header/Nav saved successfully'
frontend_features.Unsaved changes indicator: WORKING - amber dot appears on tab when changes made
frontend_features.ImageUpload component: WORKING - drag & drop area with 5MB limit
frontend_features.Access control (frontend): WORKING - manager cannot see Website Settings in sidebar, redirected if direct URL access

components_verified.ImageUpload: Reusable, handles upload to /api/admin/website-settings/upload-image, shows progress, preview, and delete
components_verified.ListEditor: Reusable, supports drag & drop reordering, add/remove items, collapsible items

design_review.layout: Clean, organized layout with tabs at top and content below
design_review.spacing: Proper spacing between form fields and sections
design_review.contrast: Good contrast - dark text on light backgrounds
design_review.buttons: Save buttons clearly visible at bottom right of each tab
